Docs sidebar

Approval escalation note

Approval escalation summary

Approval escalation note

Approval escalation notes matter when operators need to document why rollback authority must move to a higher review tier during an ongoing incident.

The note should capture review checkpoints, queue health evidence, and the exact fallback queues that justified the escalation.

It should also explain which fairness controls stay in force while the higher approval path remains active.
